message:
🐛 Fix MoveCard: persist dashboard_id + atomic limit check

* 🐛 Fix MoveCard: persist dashboard_id + atomic limit check (#10188)

- Add dashboard_id to UpdateCard SQL SET clause so moves are persisted
- Add MoveCardWithLimit store method that atomically checks the target
  dashboard card count and updates the card in a single SQL statement,
  preventing TOCTOU races under concurrent load
- Update MoveCard handler to use MoveCardWithLimit instead of the
  non-atomic count-then-update pattern

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 Add MoveCardWithLimit to MockStore to fix CI build

The Store interface gained MoveCardWithLimit but MockStore and
embedded test stores were missing it, causing build failures in
pkg/api and pkg/api/handlers test suites.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

* 🐛 Fix TestMoveCard test to use MoveCardWithLimit

The handler now delegates to MoveCardWithLimit for atomic limit checks.
Update the cardMutationStore test double to implement MoveCardWithLimit
and set moveErr = ErrDashboardCardLimitReached so the test exercises
the correct code path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

---------

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -95,6 +95,7 @@ type Store interface {
 	CreateCard(ctx context.Context, card *models.Card) error
 	CreateCardWithLimit(ctx context.Context, card *models.Card, maxCards int) error
 	UpdateCard(ctx context.Context, card *models.Card) error
+	MoveCardWithLimit(ctx context.Context, cardID uuid.UUID, targetDashboardID uuid.UUID, maxCards int) error
 	DeleteCard(ctx context.Context, id uuid.UUID) error
 	UpdateCardFocus(ctx context.Context, cardID uuid.UUID, summary string) error
